verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Am I a soldier of the cross, A follower of the Lamb, And shall I fear to own His cause, Or blush to speak His Name?

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: And when the battle's over, We shall wear a crown! Yes, we shall wear a crown! Yes, we shall wear a crown! And when the battle's over, We shall wear a crown In the new Jerusalem.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Wear a crown, wear a crown, Wear a bright and shining crown. And when the battle's over, We shall wear a crown In the new Jerusalem.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Must I be carried to the skies On flow'ry beds of ease, While others fought to win the prize, And sailed through bloody seas?

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: And when the battle's over, We shall wear a crown! Yes, we shall wear a crown! Yes, we shall wear a crown! And when the battle's over, We shall wear a crown In the new Jerusalem.

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: Wear a crown, wear a crown, Wear a bright and shining crown. And when the battle's over, We shall wear a crown In the new Jerusalem.

verse.name: V7
verse.lines: Are there no foes for me to face? Must I not stem the flood? Is this vile world a friend to grace To help me on to God?

verse.name: V8
verse.lines: And when the battle's over, We shall wear a crown! Yes, we shall wear a crown! Yes, we shall wear a crown! And when the battle's over, We shall wear a crown In the new Jerusalem.

verse.name: V9
verse.lines: Wear a crown, wear a crown, Wear a bright and shining crown. And when the battle's over, We shall wear a crown In the new Jerusalem.

verse.name: V10
verse.lines: Sure I must fight if I would reign, Increase my courage, Lord; I'll bear the toil, endure the pain. Supported by Thy Word.

verse.name: V11
verse.lines: And when the battle's over, We shall wear a crown! Yes, we shall wear a crown! Yes, we shall wear a crown! And when the battle's over, We shall wear a crown In the new Jerusalem.

verse.name: V12
verse.lines: Wear a crown, wear a crown, Wear a bright and shining crown. And when the battle's over, We shall wear a crown In the new Jerusalem.
